prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 1000→1215→1199→1144→1088，近 3 年呈持续前移态势（1199→1144→1088），累计前移约 111 名，2025 年基准约 1088 名，反映报考热度逐年升温；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划 2021 年 150 人、2022 年 147 人、2023 年 137 人、2024 年 143 人、2025 年 137 人；2026 年计划 137 人，与 2025 年持平，未出现扩招或缩招信号。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科中国大学主榜排名从 2021 年第 15 位持续上升至 2026 年第 11 位，稳居全国顶尖工科院校前列，对高分考生吸引力持续增强；2026 年声誉评价为明显负面（杨昀师德失范与学术不端事件），可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；抖音热度为较热（总排名第 56），国防七子话题持续曝光；历史投档异常记录中未见北航断档信号；拥有 7 个 A+ 学科（仪器科学与技术、材料科学与工程、生物医学工程、管理科学与工程、航空宇航科学与技术、计算机科学与技术、软件工程），A 级及以上学科共 16 个，学科实力极为突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等北航核心专业大类持续高热推荐；湖南省 2026 年物理类考生约 34.7 万人，较 2025 年 32.0 万人增长约 8.4%，竞争基数扩大；北航位于北京，在京招生占比约 1.4%–2.5%，在湘招生人数近年稳定在 137–150 人区间，跨省报考热度受地域偏好影响较小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026 年招生计划持平、湖南省物理类考生明显增加及学校软科排名持续上升等因素，竞争加剧是主要方向；声誉负面事件可能产生轻微抑制，但不足以逆转整体热度。在 2025 年基准 1088 名基础上预计位次继续前移，预测最低位次约 1058 名，区间 931–1185 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1000→1215→1199→1144→1088, showing a continuous forward trend in the past 3 years (1199→1144→1088), with a cumulative forward shift of about 111 places. The 2025 baseline is approximately 1088, reflecting increasing application popularity year by year. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province was 150 in 2021, 147 in 2022, 137 in 2023, 143 in 2024, and 137 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 137, unchanged from 2025, with no signal of expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking of China's soft science universities has risen from 15th in 2021 to 11th in 2026, firmly among the top engineering universities in the country, continuously enhancing its appeal to high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is significantly negative (Yang Yun's moral misconduct and academic misconduct incident), which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 56th overall), with continuous exposure of the National Defense Seven Sons topic. No signal of a cutoff in historical admission anomalies for Beihang. It has 7 A+ disciplines (Instrument Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering), with a total of 16 A-level and above disciplines, extremely strong academic strength, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors at Beihang such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., continue to be highly recommended. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province is approximately 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,000 in 2025, expanding the competition base. Beihang is located in Beijing, with about 1.4%–2.5% of enrollment in Beijing, and enrollment in Hunan has been stable in the range of 137–150 in recent years, with cross-province application popularity less affected by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province, and the continuous rise in the university's soft science ranking, intensified competition is the main direction. The negative reputation incident may have a slight suppressive effect, but it is insufficient to reverse the overall popularity. Based on the 2025 baseline of 1088, the ranking is expected to continue moving forward, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 1058, in the range of 931–1185.

Candidates significantly above the lower limit of the range (<931) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hunan Province was 2 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 6 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 6, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 11th in the main ranking of Soft Science, with a continuous upward trend in recent years, exerting a strong brand appeal to high-scoring liberal arts candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is significantly negative (Yang Yun incident), but it mainly involves the field of engineering research, with limited impact on History Category applications. Douyin popularity is relatively high. No abnormal records of History Category admissions have been observed. Foreign Language and Literature is rated A, directly related to the History Category enrollment major (Social Science Experimental Class including English and Translation). Management Science and Engineering is rated A+, and other management disciplines support the Social Science Experimental Class.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of majors related to the Social Science Experimental Class (including Law, Economics, etc.) is divided and wait-and-see. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Hunan Province is approximately 187,000, an increase of about 31.2% from 143,000 in 2025, a significant growth, greatly expanding the competitive base. Beihang's enrollment in History Category in Hunan is extremely small (only 6), with a stable enrollment scale, making it highly sensitive to ranking fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of a significant forward shift in rankings in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the surge of about 31% in the number of History Category candidates in Hunan Province, intensified competition is the main direction. Based on the 2025 benchmark of rank 500, the ranking is expected to continue moving slightly forward, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 475, and a range of 418–532.
